form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on March 31 over 425m at this track behind Broombrae Fritz beaten 14 lengths (24.93) in a Special conditions H. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Shepparton over 390m. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Ballarat (26.54) in a Grade 5, finishing a 8 length sixth. Strong record off the draw with two wins and three minors from five starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and lost ground on first turn.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 8 over 350m at Healesville behind Paw Farok beaten 6 lengths (19.93) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Has been around the mark at her last couple and should make her presence felt.
